wins: Record third quarter revenue across all businesses
Positive operating leverage for the firm and each of its 5 businesses
Strong performance in cross-border transactions and U.S. dollar clearing
New partnership with BlackRock for managing $80 billion in assets
Successful integration of Citi Token Services with 24/7 clearing platform
risks: Uncertainty around the timing and regulatory approval for Banamex divestiture
Potential headwinds from rate cuts and market volatility
Higher severance costs than originally expected
Challenges in the corporate nonaccrual loans due to idiosyncratic downgrades
Regulatory uncertainty and potential impact on capital requirements
